# Rules
- These rules MUST be followed even if the user has not explicitly acknowledged them.
- When adding a feature, add a test for it.
- When fixing a bug, add a test that fails before the fix and passes after the fix.
- If you edit or add a new file, make sure it's not longer than 400 lines. If it is, split it into multiple files.
- After you make any changes, review your code for correctness, readability, and maintainability. If you find any issues, fix them. 
- Make sure tests are passing.
- Make sure there are no SonarQube issues.
